ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "insurer" TEXT /* Name of the patient's health insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Patient's insurance ID number */,
  "admit_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease diagnosed */,
  "assigned_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor assigned to the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_assigned_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the doctor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the doctor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the doctor has */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the doctor is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* How the disease is transmitted */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Brief summary of the treatment options available for the disease */,
  "prevention_methods" TEXT /* Brief summary of the prevention methods for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being admitted */,
  "admit_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_admission" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's admission */,
  "ward_number" TEXT /* Number of the ward where the patient is admitted */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Number of the room where the patient is admitted */,
  "admitting_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who admitted the patient */,
  "referring_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who referred the patient (if applicable) */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Initial diagnosis upon admission */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Initial treatment plan */,
  "discharge_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's condition at discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_admitting_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("admitting_doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_referring_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("referring_doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the patient
Phone number of the emergency contact
